_description: CS-IAM — upstream images consumed by the stack. The monitor tracks digests and triggers a release when an upstream image moves.

images.name: zitadel
images.description: Zitadel OIDC/IAM application image (PostgreSQL 18 needs >= v4.11.0)

images.name: zitadel-login
images.description: Login v2 hosted UI — version-matched to the Zitadel core (LOGIN_VERSION)

images.name: python-alpine
images.description: Base image for directory-sync and database-backup

images.name: alpine
images.description: Base for the provisioner (tofu binary staged in) + machine-key prep step (OpenTofu version pinned via the provisioner Dockerfile ARG)
